description:
Native American English. Male, late teens. High quality, clean recording.
Persona: curious young maker. Emotion: bright, eager, inquisitive.
A light, youthful, high-set male voice still settling toward an adult register, catching now and then on a warmer low note. Bright and fast, tumbling quicker when a mechanism excites him, then pressing one beat past where grown-ups expect. Flat, neutral accent with no regional color.
text: [curious] But how does it actually work? Not the... the version you tell Amelia. The real one. [excited] Just let me open it, I can see the whole thing in my head, just give me ten minutes and a screwdriver.
